nl_query: Which questions are grouped under the Choice group for attempt rule 1?
failed_sql:
SELECT ar.id AS rule_id, arg.group_label, COUNT(argq.question_id) AS questions_in_group
FROM   attempt_rule                ar
JOIN   attempt_rule_group          arg  ON arg.attempt_rule_id = ar.id
JOIN   attempt_rule_group_question argq ON argq.group_id       = arg.id
WHERE  ar.rule_type = 'PICK_N'
  AND  ar.question_id = :parent_question_id
GROUP  BY ar.id, arg.group_label, ar.min_select, ar.max_select
ORDER  BY arg.group_label;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column 'q.title' does not exist. Verify that the column is defined on the table referenced by its alias prefix, or that the alias prefix matches a table declared in FROM/JOIN.
